title: Change the amount to euro instead of dollar
excerpt:
Description

posts.author: RoelBijvelds (Roel Bijvelds)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

For invoices and quotes, you can create an invoice in euros, but in the overview the column always remains in dollars. You cannot adjust this, and it also doesn’t automatically change to the currency chosen on the invoice or quote.

What are you trying to achieve

I would like the overview to automatically display in the correct currency, based on the one chosen in the invoice or quote.
